full_text:
Cao [unknown] (Wenshu) 曹? (文叔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao [unknown] (曹?), styledWenshu (文叔). Relative of Cao Shuang and husband of Xiahou Lingnü. Died young without children. Cao [unknown] was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
